name: Skillveri Aura MR Lite Welding Simulator

reviews.review_description: Tells you to pay a subscription fee, but doesn't give you the option, or even instructions on how to do so.

I had tried this app and it is really awesome. The welding effects are so realistic,  
stunned to see when the first arc was stricken. the level based learning indeed helps
to add each skill progressively. the app guides you onscreen so that you can know if you are doing right.
 looking forward for the premium features which will be an added advantage

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great feedback! We're glad you enjoyed the realistic welding effects and level-based learning. Stay tuned for premium features—they’ll make the experience even better! 🔥💪
